title: UNHOUSED DAYTIME ACCESS CENTER - 211info
text: OPEN DOOR HOUSINGWORKS UNHOUSED DAYTIME ACCESS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day center with access to hot meals, food boxes, showers, personal hygiene items, telephones, mail services, and case management support. 34420 SW Tualatin Valley Highway Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Food Boxes: Unrestricted Homeless services: Income must be at or below 50% Area Medan Income (AMI) Other services: Individuals experiencing or at-risk of homelessness Hours: Day center services: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm Hot meals: Monday-Friday noon-1pm Food boxes: Monday-Friday 9am-2:30pm Email (503) 640-6689 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 640-6689 Main phone Main phone (503) 640-6689 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the south side of Tualatin Valley Highway between Hillsboro and Cornelius. Served by TriMet bus line #57, westbound stop is Baseline and Valley View, eastbound stop is Baseline and 345th. Services: Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Community Meals Food Pantries Homeless Drop In Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Restrooms Public Showers/Baths Telephone Facilities Temporary Mailing Address Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
